---
title: Fechas
author: Carlos Lesmes
date: Febrero 2026
format:
  html:
    theme: materia
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: show
    df-print: kable
    embed-resources: true
lang : es
warning: false
---

## Fechas en R

```{r}
suppressMessages(library(lubridate))
ymd("20110604")
mdy("06-04-2011")
dmy("04/06/2011")
```
```{r}
library(readr)
library(xts)
ventas <- read_csv("ventas.csv")
str(ventas)
ventas$Period <- dmy(ventas$Period)
names(ventas)
```

```{r}
data_matrix <- as.matrix(ventas[, c("Revenue", "Sales_quantity","Average_cost","The_average_annual_payroll_of_the_region")])
time_index <- as.POSIXct(ventas$Period)
multivariate_xts <- xts(x = data_matrix, order.by = time_index)
multivariate_xts
```
```{r}
library(dygraphs)
dygraph(ventas)
```
